name: validation-layer
description: Implement schema-aware query validation with operator-type compatibility checking
acceptanceCriteria: types.ts: IQueryValidator interface with validateQuery(ast, schemaName, modelName)
types.ts: ValidationResult type with {valid: boolean, errors: ValidationError[]}
types.ts: ValidationError with code (INVALID_PROPERTY | INVALID_OPERATOR), message, path
types.ts: OPERATOR_BY_TYPE maps JSON Schema types to valid operators
validator.ts: Uses lazy memoization for schema lookups (caches property types)
validator.ts: clearCache() method for schema reload scenarios
validator.ts: Integrates with meta-store for property type lookup
validator.ts: Returns actionable error messages with property path
index.ts: Barrel exports QueryValidator, IQueryValidator, ValidationResult, ValidationError, OPERATOR_BY_TYPE
Validates operator compatibility with property type (e.g., $gt not valid on boolean)
